Changes requested: core implementation and validation mostly pass, but the task brief explicitly requires state-changing subagent endpoints to use Idempotency-Key semantics. The implementation mounts idempotencyMiddleware on PATCH /simulated-market/subagents/:agentId and DELETE /simulated-market/subagents/:agentId, but apps/server/src/lib/idempotency.ts only wraps POST, so PATCH/DELETE currently do not replay, conflict, or store idempotent responses. The handoff also acknowledges this gap. Fix within the same task by either providing real idempotency/replay for PATCH/DELETE in the allowed route/service scope, or narrowing the endpoint contract/docs/smoke to POST-only idempotency if controller accepts that; because the brief currently lists Idempotency-Key for PATCH/DELETE, implementation and contract are inconsistent. Also add smoke coverage for whichever behavior is chosen.
